agent_memory_rule: Agent memory can only receive sanitized, approved, purpose-bound summaries.
approval_rule: Founder approval is mandatory for any transition from source candidate to usable context.
audit_rule: Every usage decision must be recorded with source_id, class_id, purpose, allowed_destination, approver and timestamp.
learning_rule: Learning is allowed only from sanitized operational signals and never from raw private source content.
publication_rule: No private, sensitive or raw founder context may be published in a public repository.
runtime_rule: No private source content may be used by runtime, agents or prompts before triage, sanitization and usage authorization.
